Western Civilization- Antiquity to the Renaissance: Honors

notes: Students interested in this major must meet the following requirements. Required for admission : Meet all basic UC admission requirements with a minimum grade of C or better Have a cumulative UC transferable GPA of 2.7 (3.4 for TAG) Complete 60 semester or 90 quarter units of UC transferable credit by the end of the spring term prior to the fall quarter of enrollment Complete the UCI Lower-Division Writing Requirement Recommended for admission : Language Other Than English: Review the two-year Language other than English school requirement , and prepare accordingly. This is in addition to the UC LOTE requirement. Humanities Core: Complete four semesters/six quarters, or a combination thereof, including at least one lower-division course in each of the following four areas: lower-division writing, literature, history and philosophy (a course is not required in the area of student's major). To reach the total number of courses required, additional courses approved for UCI General Education Category IV in Humanities disciplines outside the major can be selected; OR Complete a one-year lower-division humanities sequence which deals with problems of concern to the disciplines of history, literature, and philosophy, and which emphasizes the reading and analysis of significant texts ﻿ In fulfillment of the requirements below, a single course may be used only once. NOTE: UC credit limitations may apply to courses with duplicative content. Please refer to the list of the college's UC transferable courses for details about credit limitations. For information regarding the AP and IB examination credit policies refer to the UCI General Catalogue. For more information regarding the UC Irvine Transfer Admission Guarantee Program, please visit TAG
